node.text: Pehli Baar Kisi Ne sach bola hai😁
@ranusahu__1119 shi nhi bola wo letter change ho gya h usse😂
Ye video paka ladki ne banayi hogi😂😂
Exactly sorry is an easyword now a days whatever they do they think sorry is enough to hide thier unexplained things....💯
💯 mujhe v esa hi lgta tha universal truth 🙌
And that sorry is just a word with no regret at all.....men..☕
"Chl thik h meri hi glti h sorry *ab khush*"
Haan abh ladko ko princess treatment chahiye 😂
Are bhai lgta h tum aise krte hoge mai direct bolta hu but ladkiya Direct kbhi nhi bolegi 😂😂
Boys(Argue) : When they are not wrong. And think they are not wrong Girls(Argue): When they are wrong. But still think they are not wrong. 😂😂
"Chl thik h meri hi glti h sorry *ab khush*"
